children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Extract and validate the command field from the input JSON
children.behavior: Parse the input JSON and extract the 'command' field, returning it as a string or error if missing/invalid
postconditions: Command is one of the allowed values or error is set
guarantees: Returns command or error, never both

outputs.name: error
outputs.description: Error if command missing or invalid

constraints.description: Command must be one of: send, history, create_channel, join

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid JSON with 'send' command, returns ('send', '')
Given valid JSON with missing command, returns ('', 'Missing command')

children.stop_reason: Pure parsing function with no side effects

children.name: SendMessage
children.purpose: Handle the 'send' command by storing a message in the appropriate channel
children.behavior: Validate that the user is a member of the target channel, then append the message to the messages data store with timestamp
preconditions: Input contains channel_id and message content
postconditions: Message is stored if user is member
guarantees: Message is not stored if user is not a member

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Original input JSON with send details

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check if user is a member of the target channel
Append the new message to the channel's message list

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Success or error response for send operation

global_vars.description: Check user membership in target channel
Append new message to channel's message list

data_operations.description: Check if user is a member of the target channel
Append the new message to the channel's message list

constraints.description: User must be a member of the target channel

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid send request from channel member, message is stored and success returned
Given valid send request from non-member, error returned and message not stored
Given send request with empty content, error returned

children.stop_reason: Can be further decomposed into membership check and message append

children.name: GetHistory
children.purpose: Handle the 'history' command by retrieving recent messages from a channel
children.behavior: Validate channel exists, then return up to 100 most recent messages from the messages data store
postconditions: Returns up to 100 messages sorted by timestamp
guarantees: Does not modify any data store

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: List of messages (max 100) or error if channel not found

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid channel_id, returns list of messages (max 100)
Messages are sorted by timestamp descending

children.stop_reason: Can be further decomposed into channel check and message query

children.name: CreateChannel
children.purpose: Handle the 'create_channel' command by adding a new channel
children.behavior: Validate channel name is unique, then create a new channel entry in the channels data store
postconditions: New channel is added to channels data store if name unique

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Original input JSON with channel name

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check uniqueness and then create new channel entry

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Success with channel details or error if name taken

global_vars.description: Check uniqueness and create new channel entry

data_operations.description: Check uniqueness and then create new channel entry

acceptance_criteria.description: Given unique channel name, channel is created and success returned
Given duplicate channel name, error returned and channel not created
Given empty channel name, error returned

children.stop_reason: Atomic operation with single data store write

children.name: JoinChannel
children.purpose: Handle the 'join' command by adding a user to a channel's member list
children.behavior: Validate channel exists, then add the user to the channel's member list if not already a member
postconditions: User is added to channel members if channel exists and not already member

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Original input JSON with channel_id and user_id

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check channel exists and update member list

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Success or error if channel not found or already member

global_vars.description: Check channel exists and update member list

data_operations.description: Check channel exists and update member list

constraints.description: User must not already be a member

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid channel and new user, user is added and success returned
Given user already a member, error returned

children.stop_reason: Atomic operation with single data store update

governance_notes: All children preserve Stage 1 semantics and Stage 2 interfaces exactly. Resource fields are derived from internal_leaf_accesses. ParseCommand has no data operations and thus no global_vars or requested_capabilities. For all other children, global_vars and data_operations are synchronized one-to-one with internal_leaf_accesses. No deliberate exceptions exist.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures are unchanged from Stage 2: ParseCommand returns Tuple[str, str], all others return Dict.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: Each child's internal_leaf_accesses map directly to their data_operations and global_vars. ParseCommand has no accesses. SendMessage maps channels.read and messages.write. GetHistory maps channels.read and messages.read. CreateChannel and JoinChannel each map channels.read_write.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each child with internal_leaf_accesses, global_vars and data_operations contain identical entries (same resource, same op, same description). ParseCommand has empty arrays for both, which is consistent.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All data store accesses from internal_leaf_accesses are covered by global_vars and data_operations. No resource is accessed without being declared. No resource is declared without being accessed.
